debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
l : List (List α)
l1 : List α
idx idx1 : ℕ
hidx : idx < l.length
hidx1 : idx1 < l1.length
⊢ ∃ idx',
    (l.set idx (l1.eraseIdx idx1)).flatten = (l.set idx l1).flatten.eraseIdx ↑idx' ∧
      l1[idx1] = (l.set idx l1).flatten[idx']
